mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_res_mst ( res_id, res_se_cd, full_nm, mobile_no, email_addr, reg_id, reg_dtm, del_yn, task_tgt_id ) VALUES ( #{resourceId}, 'EMPLOYEE', #{fullName}, #{mobileNumber}, #{emailAddress}, #{registeredBy}, #{registeredAt}, 'N', #{taskTargetId} )

INSERT INTO tb_res_employee ( res_id, emp_no, org_id, employ_status_cd, reg_id, reg_dtm, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{resourceId}, #{employeeNumber}, #{organizationId}, 'EMPLOYED', #{registeredBy}, #{registeredAt}, 'N' )
